perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in black sportswear standing beside a vertical pole in a studio; she grips the pole and begins a series of acrobatic maneuvers. (2) She performs fluid spins and inversions, displaying significant core strength and flexibility while maintaining a calm facial expression. (3) The performance continues with complex leg hooks and horizontal holds, rotating around the pole continuously. (4) She transitions into a split-like pose while suspended mid-air before the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a soft, melodic piano track. (2) At approximately 19 seconds, a female vocal track enters, singing a soft pop ballad. (3) No significant ambient noise or sound effects are present, though a very faint mechanical whir from the spinning pole can be heard by a focused listener. (4) The music and vocals continue with a steady, moderate tempo until the end of the recording.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'PANPOLE STUDIO' appears as a permanent logo/signage on the background wall, serving a branding and decorative purpose. (2) No additional text overlays, hooks, or functional subtitles are present.
